The '''School of Hidden Wisdom''' was the only [[dueling academy]] to survive the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and the rise of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. Established on [[Baltimn]] by [[Ephaan Kenzon]], it was the refuge of several surviving [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] after the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]].

The school was closed down when a number of Ephaan's students were accepted into [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Jedi Praxeum]].
